requirement_sections.title_label_raw: No development permit shall be issued in a Regional Park (RPK) Zone except for

provisions.text: No development permit shall be issued in a Regional Park (RPK) Zone except for one or more of the following uses: Recreation uses Conservation uses Uses accessory to the foregoing uses RPK ZONE REQUIREMENTS

requirement_sections.title_label_raw: In any Regional Park (RPK) Zone, no development permit shall be issued

provisions.text: In any Regional Park (RPK) Zone, no development permit shall be issued except in conformity with the following requirements: Minimum Front or Flankage Yard: 20m Minimum Side or Rear Yard: 20m Maximum Lot Coverage: 50% for lots less than 4 ha in area, or 5% for lots 4 ha or more in area

content_blocks.text: 23A.1 No development permit shall be issued in a Regional Park (RPK) Zone except for

content_blocks.heading_context_raw: one or more of the following uses:
content_blocks.text: Recreation uses Conservation uses Uses accessory to the foregoing uses
23A.2 In any Regional Park (RPK) Zone, no development permit shall be issued

content_blocks.heading_context_raw: except in conformity with the following requirements:
content_blocks.text: Minimum Front or Flankage Yard: 20m Minimum Side or Rear Yard: 20m Maximum Lot Coverage: 50% for lots less than 4 ha in area, or 5% for lots 4 ha or more in area

open_issues.description: Clause patterns listed in pending_review_clause_patterns were preserved raw because their hierarchy normalization is not yet approved in this repository context.
